message:
test(bd-8998): add server builder fluent API and build output tests

Cover ServerBuilder defaults (info, capabilities, timeout, stats,
error masking, strict validation), all fluent setters (request_timeout,
without_stats, mask_error_details, strict_input_validation, instructions,
log_level, console config), handler registration (tool/resource/prompt
enable capabilities), duplicate behavior, lifecycle hooks, and chained
builder (0 → 31 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
